title: Taipei、Taipei — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Taipei、Taipei的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Taipei是Taipei的一個城市，人口約2,646,000。The capital and largest city of Taiwan, a vibrant metropolis known for its night markets, technology industry, and Taipei 101.
